name: Guangdong SACA Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd.
summary: Guangdong SACA Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of slides, hinges, and other hardware primarily in China. The company offers double wall drawers; concealed, ball bearing, and Euro slides; furniture hardware products; and household product solutions. It serves various industries, including furniture, electrical equipment, financial equipment, automobile, IT, etc. The company also exports its products to Europe, the United States, Japan, South Korea, and approximately 100 other countries or regions. Guangdong SACA Precision Manufacturing Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Foshan, China.
